_readme: Real endpoints for the SDF public reference anchor (testanchor.stellar.org), which
exposes SEP-10/12/31/38 for open testing. Copy to anchor.config.json, then fill the
runtime fields (token, senderId, receiverId, quoteExpiresAt, packetHash, actionBinding).
token + customer IDs are ephemeral and obtained per run via the bootstrap in
docs/ANCHOR_SANDBOX.md (SEP-10 challenge -> sign -> JWT; SEP-12 PUT /customer x2).
Run from WSL (open network); the bash sandbox cannot reach testanchor.
